title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 174.757 - Director to certify copies of resource record reproduction — director to make annual report to board of regents
text:
174.757.  Director to certify copies of resource record reproduction — director to make annual report to board of regents. — 1.  The director may certify copies as being authentic reproductions of arboretum resource records held in the state.
  2.  The director shall present a report each year to the Northwest Missouri State University board of regents.
(L. 1993 S.B. 84 § 14 subsecs. 5, 6)
